extensionDescription.message: A local-only tool that magnetically aggregates specific tabs into the current window and prevents duplicates.

errorSpecialPage.message: Cannot create for browser special pages

warningSpecialPageIncluded.message: Contains URL patterns for special pages and cannot be saved

confirmDelete.message: Do you want to delete this target?

tooltipCollectFromAllGroups.message:
OFF: Tabs in regular groups without the 🧲 mark are ignored.
ON: Collects matching tabs from all tab groups.
Risk: Tabs may be moved from your manually organized groups.

tooltipKeepTMOrder.message:
OFF: The order of tab groups is not changed.
ON: Reorders tab groups at the end according to the target list order.

tooltipCollapseAfterCollect.message:
OFF: Tab groups remain open after collection.
ON: Automatically collapses tab groups after collection is complete.

tooltipDiscardTabsAfterCollect.message:
OFF: Tab content is kept in memory.
ON: Releases memory for collected and collapsed tabs.
Risk: Reloading will occur when you reopen the tab.

tooltipCloseDuplicateTabs.message:
OFF: Keeps all tabs even if they have the same URL.
ON: Keeps only one tab per URL and closes others.
Risk: Data in unsubmitted forms may be lost.

tooltipImportMode.message: Append adds only to the target list, while Overwrite replaces both the target list and common settings.

aboutDescription.message: TabMagnet-Solo is a privacy-focused tab aggregation tool. Data is stored within the browser, and no external transmission is performed. Transparency and security are maintained through dependency verification by GitHub Actions.

materialDesignCredit.message: This project uses Material Design 3, an open-source design system by Google.

disclaimer.message: [Disclaimer] This software is an open-source project by an individual developer and is provided without warranty. The developer assumes no responsibility for any damages arising from its use. Please use it at your own risk.

importError.message: Import failed. Please select data in the correct format.
